title: erigeron flagellaris
intro: Erigeron flagellaris, also known as the daisy fleabane, is a perennial herb in the daisy family that is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Erigeron flagellaris include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its leaves and stems. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce swelling and pain, and support the immune system. Erigeron flagellaris can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including wounds, sprains, and skin conditions.
